subject: Life Skills
title: Wellbeing Quest
tagline: Manage stress, build resilience and maintain mental health!

sampleItems.question: What is a healthy way to deal with stress?
options: Accepting your feelings and talking it through
Talking to someone you trust
A trusted adult or counsellor
Deep breathing
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.
sampleItems.explanation: Talking to someone you trust — that's correct!

sampleItems.question: Why is it important to talk about your feelings?
options: It helps you cope and feel supported
How much you value and respect yourself
A trusted adult or counsellor
Withdrawing from friends and family
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.
sampleItems.explanation: It helps you cope and feel supported — that's correct!

sampleItems.question: What is 'self-esteem'?
options: Deep breathing
It helps your brain rest and recover
It releases feel-good chemicals in the brain
How much you value and respect yourself
sampleItems.hint: Think back to what you learned about this topic.
sampleItems.explanation: How much you value and respect yourself — that's correct!

sampleItems.question: Name one way to relax your mind.
options: A trusted adult or counsellor
Deep breathing
Withdrawing from friends and family
It releases feel-good chemicals in the brain
